news.summary: The justices were tasked with determining if an agency had met federal law requirements by releasing a report spanning 3,600 pages regarding the effects of a planned railway project in Utah.
news.headline: SC limits environmental reviews, arguing over compliance with federal law for 3,600-page report on Utah railway impact.

news.summary: Dick's Sporting Goods Inc (NYSE: DKS) released disappointing first-quarter 2025 results with adjusted earnings per share at $3.37, falling short of the anticipated $4.34. The quarterly sales stood at $3.17 billion, reflecting a 5.2% increase from the previous year but missing the expected $3.59 billion. The company announced its intention to acquire Foot Locker, highlighting it as a significant and transformative step. The merger aims to combine the strengths of both brands to establish a dominant global player in the sports retail sector, catering to a wider range of athletes.
news.headline: Dick's Sporting Goods Inc (NYSE: DKS) disappoints with Q1, reporting $3.37 EPS (below estimated $4.34) & $3.17B sales. Eyeing Foot Locker acquisition.

news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, Haig Partners LLC has published its Q1 2025 Haig Report®, the oldest quarterly report in the auto retail sector analyzing industry trends and their influence on dealership valuations. The report highlights a continued robust performance for numerous auto dealerships in Q1 2025, with profits experiencing just a 1% decline compared to the previous year. Presently, the average auto dealership is generating approximately double the profit compared to pre-pandemic levels. This Q1 2025 report commemorates the 11th year since the inception of The Haig Report®.
news.headline: Auto dealership profits remain high with only a 1% decrease in Q1 2025 year-over-year, making double the profit compared to pre-pandemic levels. Haig Partners LLC released its Q1 2025 Haig Report®, marking its 11th anniversary.

news.summary: Bell Techlogix, an Indianapolis-based company, has achieved certification as a Great Place To Work for the third consecutive year as of May 29, 2025. The certification, awarded by Great Place To Work, relies on feedback from employees to assess workplace satisfaction. This year, an impressive 86% of employees in the U.S. reported positive experiences with the company.
news.headline: Bell Techlogix earns 2025 Great Place To Work Certification™ for the third consecutive year, with 86% U.S. employees satisfied.

news.summary: This week, Myriad is focusing on several key markets. One notable area of interest is the price outlook for Ethereum, with analysts forecasting a potential increase to $4,000. Another significant market is the upcoming Polish election, where experts are closely monitoring developments that could impact the political landscape. Additionally, Myriad is closely following the French Open, anticipating exciting matches and potential upsets as top players compete for the prestigious title.
news.headline: Exciting week ahead: Predictions on #Ethereum price, Polish election, and French Open in Myriad's top markets.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Saskatchewan-based company PHARMACORP RX INC. announced the submission of its unaudited financial statements and accompanying MD&A for the initial quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The Corporation, also known as PharmaCorp, listed on the TSXV under the ticker symbol PCRX, expressed satisfaction with this development. Additionally, PharmaCorp disclosed the signing of non-binding letters of intent concerning the acquisition of four pharmacies, continuing their expansion efforts in the industry.
news.headline: PharmaCorp Rx Inc. reveals Q1 2025 results, filing unaudited financial statements on SEDAR. Company to acquire four pharmacies.

news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, Travel + Leisure Co. (NYSE:TNL) has been recognized by U.S. News & World Report as one of the Best Companies to Work For in the 2025-2026 list. The editorial team of U.S. News evaluates publicly traded American companies to assist employees and job seekers in selecting suitable workplaces. The ranking includes companies in the top 25% across various sectors and industries. Travel + Leisure Co. is a leading membership and leisure travel company globally.
news.headline: Travel + Leisure Co. named one of the Best Companies to Work For by U.S. News & World Report for 2025-2026.
Fed's Kugler Opening Remarks At the 2025 Federal Reserve Board Macro-Finance Workshop

news.summary: A groundbreaking AI algorithm called PromoterAI has been introduced by Illumina Inc. (NASDAQ: ILMN) in San Diego on May 29, 2025. This innovative algorithm is capable of decoding pathogenic regulatory genetic variants in the noncoding sections of the human genome on a large scale for the first time. Through this technology, a significant advancement has been made in accurately identifying these genetic variants, providing new insights into potential health risks and conditions.
news.headline: Illumina introduces PromoterAI, an innovative AI algorithm to decode genetic variants for rare diseases, scaling diagnosis.

news.summary: Velocity Performance Alliance (VPA) is taking the fast lane from motorsport to real estate in Los Angeles with a high-end strategy. Formed by Oasis Design & Development Corporation and Verge, this collaboration promises an exciting venture. The alliance aims to combine the adrenaline rush of motorsport with the sophistication of luxury properties. This groundbreaking partnership is set to redefine the real estate landscape. Mark your calendars for this thrilling development.
news.headline: Velocity Performance Alliance partners with Oasis Design & Development Corp and Verge for luxury auto real estate platform. NASCAR debut pending. Los Angeles, May 29, 2025.
Fed's Kulger: I'm keenly interested in connections between the economy and commercial real estate.
Fed's Kulger: We need to better understand US assets’ safe haven status.
Fed's Kulger I'm watching to better understand the link between trade and market vulnerability.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Montreal, Theratechnologies Inc. disclosed the outcomes of its annual shareholders' meeting, which occurred virtually. The company, listed as TSX: TH and NASDAQ: THTX, is a biopharmaceutical entity.
news.headline: Theratechnologies Inc. reports voting results from their annual meeting, held virtually, on May 29, 2025.
Fed's Kulger does not comment on economic, monetary policy outlook in opening remarks to Fed macro-finance workshop in Washington

news.summary: In São Paulo on May 29, 2025, it was reported that the nutritional supplement market in the United States is experiencing significant growth, fueled by a rising focus among consumers on health, preventive care, and longevity. Around 76% of survey participants indicated their intention to incorporate supplements into their daily routine on a regular basis.
news.headline: Brazilian company Duas Rodas introduces Cerrado-sourced Quercetin to global market; 76% of US consumers prioritize well-being with supplements.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Chicago, Black Buffalo, a prominent modern alternative to traditional smokeless tobacco, revealed Cody Garbrandt, a UFC fighter and former Bantamweight Champion, as the brand's latest ambassador. Garbrandt, renowned for his striking ability and toughness in the Octagon, joins forces with the brand to promote their products.
news.headline: UFC fighter Cody Garbrandt becomes brand ambassador for Black Buffalo, May 29, 2025.

news.summary: Starting on June 1st, the National Dog Bite Awareness Campaign will be launched. In 2025, there were over 6,000 reported cases of dog attacks on Postal Service workers. As part of this year's campaign, the USPS is providing education and resources to prevent such incidents.
news.headline: USPS reports over 6,000 dog attacks on employees in 2024. National Dog Bite Awareness Campaign to begin June 1.

news.summary: A collaboration between exSat, OKX, and Standard Chartered has produced compliant and capital-efficient yield solutions by utilizing exSat's Bitcoin-native infrastructure, OKX's liquid markets, and Standard Chartered's asset custodianship. This partnership was announced in Las Vegas on May 29, 2025. The collaboration aims to offer innovative financial services leveraging these companies' expertise, with exSat being a prominent Bitcoin digital banking service provider.
news.headline: exSat and OKX partner with Standard Chartered to tap into Bitcoin yield opportunities for institutions, boosting liquidity.
FED'S KULGER: MONITORING SHIFTS IN POSSIBLE LOWER DEMAND FOR U.S. ASSETS

Elon Musk quits his role in Trump’s gov’t as head of DOGE, while voicing frustration with rising federal spending. He promises to refocus on Tesla & SpaceX after sales dipped and protests flared. ‘The DOGE mission,’ he says, ‘must become a way of life.’

news.summary: The most recent network upgrade for Ethereum, known as Pectra, has led to increased technical efficiencies and a surge in institutional interest, as stated in a recent report by JPMorgan. The upgrade, which was implemented this month, included various Ethereum Improvement Proposals (EIPs) aimed at improving staking performance, reward systems, and transaction processing. These alterations were designed to make Ethereum more enticing to institutional investors. JPMorgan analysts, headed by Nikolaos Panigirtzoglou, noted that while these advancements signify strategic advancement, they have not yet resulted in a significant boost in on-chain activity.
news.headline: Ethereum's Spectra upgrade attracts institutional investors, but on-chain activity remains slow, says JPMorgan.
HYUNDAI CONSIDERING A 1% INCREASE TO THE SUGGESTED RETAIL PRICE OF EVERY MODEL IN ITS LINEUP IN THE US STARTING AS SOON AS NEXT WEEK

news.summary: In a recent oversight hearing at the California Assembly on May 29, 2025, state regulators presented new findings indicating that oil refiners supplying branded stations in California have significantly benefitted from consumers. The data disclosed suggests that refiners have reportedly reaped substantial profits from operating in the state. These revelations have raised concerns about the transparency and accuracy of the financial information provided by oil refiners in the region.
news.headline: Oil refiners profiteering from consumers in California revealed at oversight hearing with regulators showing new data.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in San Francisco, aviation investment manager SKY Leasing disclosed the completion of a secured notes issuance. SLAM 2025-1 Limited and SLAM 2025-1 LLC issued $503 million worth of Notes. SLAM aims to utilize some of these proceeds for specific purposes.
news.headline: SKY Leasing closes $503 million secured notes offering by SLAM to fund aviation investments.

news.summary: A report from BCC Research indicates that the market for hyperspectral imaging technology is estimated to increase from $301.4 million in 2024 to $472.9 million by the end of 2029, with a compound annual growth rate of 9.4%. The study examines market segments and regions, including North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific, and Rest of the World, and analyzes trends, revenue data, and emerging technologies. Factors driving market growth include remote sensing demand for applications like environmental monitoring and agriculture, medical and space utilization for disease detection and planetary analysis, agricultural benefits such as crop health monitoring and resource optimization, technological advancements like miniaturized sensors, and government funding for research and development. Stakeholders like defense companies, distributors, precision agricultural firms, and investors can benefit from insights provided by the report.
news.headline: Hyperspectral Imaging Market to reach $472.9M by 2029, with a CAGR of 9.4% from 2024. Trends in defense, precision farming drive growth.

news.summary: Capri Holdings Limited (NYSE: CPRI) announced their fourth-quarter results, reporting an adjusted earnings per share of $4.90 loss, which fell short of analysts' expectations of a 14 cents loss. Quarterly sales totaled $1.035 billion, a 15.4% decrease compared to the previous year, surpassing the anticipated $986.57 million. When adjusted for constant currency, total revenue saw a 14.1% decline. CEO John D. Idol expressed concerns over the uncertainty related to tariffs impacting the global economy but emphasized a focus on implementing new strategic initiatives to drive future growth for Capri Holdings. The company aims to reach $4 billion in revenue for Michael Kors and $800 million for Jimmy Choo in the long term.
news.headline: Capri Holdings reports Q4 loss of $4.90 per share, $1.035 billion in sales, down 15.4% YoY. CEO confident in future growth plans.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, Quantum has announced that its backup, archive, and object storage platforms are now compatible with the most recent LTO standard. This upgrade provides unparalleled density and efficiency for users.
news.headline: Quantum enables industry's highest capacity with LTO-10 for Scalar Tape, maximizing storage efficiency and scalability.
WH Press Sec. Leavitt: Trump told Canada the US is subsidizing their defense.
Hyundai price increases would take effect as soon as next week.
Hyundai is poised to increase car prices by 1% and raise other fees.

news.summary: Investors who suffered losses are urged to reach out to Hagens Berman regarding the recent events surrounding UroGen Pharma Ltd. (NASDAQ: URGN). The company's shares plummeted by 44% on May 21, 2025, following the announcement by UroGen Pharma Ltd. about the FDA's Oncologic Drugs Advisory Committee.
news.headline: URGN shares plummeted by 44% as FDA votes against UGN-102, facing investor backlash. Contact Hagens Berman if facing losses.

news.summary: Investors who have incurred losses are advised to get in touch with the firm in San Francisco as SelectQuote Inc. (NYSE: SLQT) experienced heightened investor scrutiny on May 12, 2025, when its shares dropped by 12% after quarterly results missed expectations.
news.headline: SelectQuote (SLQT) shares drop 12% after disappointing earnings, facing DOJ scrutiny as investors push back.
WH Press Sec. Leavitt when asked about 90-day window: Trade agenda is moving forward.

news.summary: An esteemed civic figure will oversee the advancement of Woodsboro Bank in Frederick County. The Board of Directors made this decision on May 29, 2025, to bolster the bank's growth and influence within the community. The appointment is seen as a strategic move to capitalize on the bank's positive momentum.
news.headline: Woodsboro Bank in Frederick, Maryland appoints Rich Ohnmacht as new CEO to lead growth and impact in the community.
WHITE HOUSE SAYS TRUMP HOPES RUSSIA, UKRAINE MEET FOR DIRECT TALKS NEXT WEEK

news.summary: Rio2 Limited, a company listed on TSXV (RIO), OTCQX (RIOFF), and BVL (RIO), based in Vancouver, has announced their Annual General and Special Meeting of shareholders for June 4, 2025, at 11 a.m. ET. This virtual event will be accessible via live webcast, ensuring all shareholders, no matter where they are located, can participate equally. Attendance in person will not be possible at this Meeting.
news.headline: Rio2 Ltd. (TSXV: RIO; OTCQX: RIOFF; BVL: RIO) holds virtual AGM on June 4, 2025 at 11am ET, open to all.

news.summary: U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs have seen a significant influx of over $9 billion in the past five weeks, with BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin Trust leading the trend. This surge in interest from both institutional and retail investors is in contrast to gold-backed ETFs, which have experienced outflows of over $2.8 billion during the same period. Despite gold's 25% year-to-date appreciation, investors are shifting towards Bitcoin as a new "safe haven" asset, driven by concerns over surging U.S. deficits, credit rating downgrades, and central banking autonomy. This change reflects a shift in investor psychology and priorities, with Bitcoin emerging as a preferred hedge in uncertain times.
news.headline: Gen Z increasingly favoring Bitcoin over gold ETFs, with U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs attracting $9B and gold-backed ETFs experiencing $2.8B outflows in the past 5 weeks. Shift in investor priorities and trust from traditional assets to digital currency observed.

news.summary: Lunar Digital Assets has introduced LitVM, the pioneering zero-knowledge Layer-2 platform for Litecoin (LTC), indicating a shift towards on-chain programmability and integration of real-world assets for the decade-old cryptocurrency. The announcement was made at the Litecoin Summit and the Layer-2 is constructed utilizing BitcoinOS and Polygon CDK, with backing from the Litecoin Foundation. Litecoin, traditionally recognized as a lightweight peer-to-peer option to Bitcoin (BTC), seems to be embarking on a new developmental phase. Lunar Digital Assets declared the unveiling of LitVM, an EVM-compatible Layer-2 network that is trustless, at the Litecoin Summit in Las Vegas. This zero-knowledge rollup is specifically crafted to introduce smart contract capabilities and inter-chain liquidity to Litecoin for the first time. It is developed using BitcoinOS and Polygon's Chain Development Kit.
news.headline: Litecoin introduces LitVM, a zero-knowledge Layer-2 for LTC, adding smart contract functionality and cross-chain liquidity. Built using BitcoinOS and Polygon CDK. Endorsed by Litecoin Foundation.

news.summary: A recent federal court ruling has overturned President Donald Trump's authority to impose global tariffs under the International Emergency Economic Powers Act (IEEPA). This decision is expected to decrease macroeconomic volatility and revive investor interest in assets like Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and altcoins. Market experts believe that this ruling could shift investor sentiment positively due to the potential for fewer sudden policy changes. The ruling by the U.S. Court of International Trade invalidated extensive tariffs implemented by the Trump administration. Following the news, U.S. equity futures surged by 1.5%, leading to a temporary "risk-on sentiment." Marcin Kazmierczak, RedStone's co-founder and COO, highlighted the initial impact of the ruling but suggested that it is just one step in...
news.headline: Court ruling limiting Trump's tariff powers raises hope for asset revival, including Bitcoin. U.S. Court of International Trade invalidated broad tariffs by Trump, leading to a 1.5% rise in U.S. equity futures. Market participants optimistic for reduced volatility and increased investor interest in risk assets like BTC.

news.summary: SentinelOne, Inc. (NYSE: S) saw a decline in share value following a disappointing Q1 earnings report. The cybersecurity company reported revenue of $229.03 million, slightly surpassing the anticipated $228.35 million. Adjusted earnings per share were as expected at two cents. Notably, the company revised its full-year 2026 revenue outlook from $1.007 billion to a projected range of $996 million to $1.001 billion, lower than the expected $1.01 billion. Analysts adjusted ratings and price forecasts in response, with B of A Securities downgrading SentinelOne from Buy to Neutral and reducing the price target from $24 to $21, expressing concerns over unimpressive results across consecutive quarters. Further information is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: SentinelOne's disappointing Q1 earnings report shows revenue of $229.03M, adjusted EPS of $0.02, lowered 2026 revenue guidance to $996M - $1.001B. Multiple analysts downgraded the stock; B of A Securities analyst Tal Liani cut price forecast from $24 to $21 due to uninspiring results for several quarters.

news.summary: The use of Generative AI is revolutionizing markets worldwide by producing inventive solutions across various sectors. This technology encompasses automating content generation and product design, playing a pivotal role in fueling economic progress, restructuring employment landscapes, and introducing fresh prospects on a global scale. This advancement signifies a significant shift in market dynamics, showcasing the potential for advancement and growth in various industries. As of today, on May 29, 2025, the impact of Generative AI can be seen shaping the future of businesses and economies.
news.headline: Generative AI is revolutionizing global markets, driving economic growth, reshaping jobs, and opening new opportunities worldwide.

news.summary: According to recent reports, there has been a significant rise in the number of Covid-19 cases in the country. The total number of confirmed cases has surpassed 100,000, with more than 2,000 new cases reported in the last 24 hours alone. In addition, the number of deaths related to the virus has also increased, with the death toll reaching over 1,500. Health officials are urging the public to follow safety guidelines and precautions to help slow the spread of the virus.
news.headline: Ruler of Sharjah presents historical manuscript to University of Sacred Heart as a gift.
